chunks.section: College Bus Facility — Overview & General Information
chunks.content:
MSAJCE COLLEGE BUS FACILITY — OVERVIEW

The College is easily accessible from Chennai Central Railway Station, Tambaram Railway Station and CMDA Bus Station by the state operated transport service.

In addition, the College provides its own transportation for students and staff residing in and around the campus.

FLEET SIZE:
- 22 Buses
- 1 Tata ACE
- 1 Ambulance

SERVICE AREA:
Transport facility is available from various places in Chennai, Chengalpattu, Kanchipuram and Thiruvallur districts to the institute on all working days.

USES OF BUS FACILITY:
The bus facilities are utilized for:
1. Daily commute for students and staff
2. Local social service activities
3. Sports activities
4. NCC / NSS activities
5. Placement and Training activities
6. Industrial visits
7. Educational trips

OBJECTIVE:
Our transport facilities ensure that our students and staff are able to reach the college in time with utmost care and ease.

TRANSPORT COMMITTEE:
A transport committee, headed by a Convener, is formed to take care of the smooth operation of buses. The staff in-charge of the buses (one teaching and one supporting staff) ensure the smooth functioning. The Transport Committee meets once in six months. The Principal and the staff in-charge of the buses attend the meeting.
chunks.institution: MSAJCE — Mohamed Sathak A.J. College of Engineering

chunks.section: College Bus Routes — Summary Table (All 9 Routes)
chunks.content:
MSAJCE COLLEGE OWN BUS ROUTES — SUMMARY:

All buses serve: MSAJCE, MSAJAA & Nursing students and staff.
All buses arrive at M.S.A.J.C.E College at 8:00 AM.

S.No | Bus Route | Departure Time | Starting Point | PDF Route Sheet
1 | AR 3 | 5:50 AM | Uthiramerur | https://www.msajce-edu.in/images/transport/AR3.pdf
2 | AR 4 | 6:10 AM | Moolakadai | https://www.msajce-edu.in/images/transport/AR4.pdf
3 | AR 5 | 6:15 AM | MMDA School | https://www.msajce-edu.in/images/transport/AR5.pdf
4 | AR 6 | 6:15 AM | ICF | https://www.msajce-edu.in/images/transport/AR6.pdf
5 | AR 7 | 5:25 AM | Chunambedu | https://www.msajce-edu.in/images/transport/AR7.pdf
6 | AR 8 | 5:50 AM | Manjambakkam | https://www.msajce-edu.in/images/transport/AR8.pdf
7 | AR 9 | 6:15 AM | Ennore | https://www.msajce-edu.in/images/transport/AR9.pdf
8 | AR 10 | 6:25 AM | Porur | https://www.msajce-edu.in/images/transport/AR10.pdf
9 | R 22 | 6:00 AM | Nemilichery | https://www.msajce-edu.in/images/transport/R22.pdf

Earliest departure: AR 7 at 5:25 AM (Chunambedu)
Latest departure: AR 10 at 6:25 AM (Porur)
All routes terminate at MSAJCE College at 8:00 AM.
